heading: Restrictions on church tax inquiries and examinations
label: 7611 Restrictions on church tax inquiries and examinations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7611 was renumbered .section 7613 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the reasonable belief requirements of paragraph (2), and

children.label: B
children.text: the notice requirements of paragraph (3), have been met.

children.label: A
children.text: may not be exempt, by reason of its status as a church, from tax under section 501(a), or

children.label: B
children.text: may be carrying on an unrelated trade or business (within the meaning of section 513) or otherwise engaged in activities subject to taxation under this title.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The requirements of this paragraph are met with respect to any church tax inquiry if, before beginning such inquiry, the Secretary provides written notice to the church of the beginning of such inquiry.

children.label: I
children.text: the concerns which gave rise to such inquiry, and

children.label: II
children.text: the general subject matter of such inquiry, and

children.label: I
children.text: administrative and constitutional provisions with respect to such inquiry (including the right to a conference with the Secretary before any examination of church records), and

children.label: II
children.text: provisions of this title which authorize such inquiry or which may be otherwise involved in such inquiry.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of church records, to the extent necessary to determine the liability for, and the amount of, any tax imposed by this title, and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of religious activities, to the extent necessary to determine whether an organization claiming to be a church is a church for any period.

children.heading: Notice of examination; opportunity for conference
children.label: 2 Notice of examination; opportunity for conference
A
children.text: at least 15 days before the beginning of such examination, the Secretary provides the notice described in paragraph (3) to both the church and the appropriate regional counsel of the Internal Revenue Service, and

children.label: B
children.text: the church has a reasonable time to participate in a conference described in paragraph (3)(A)(iii), but only if the church requests such a conference before the beginning of the examination.

children.heading: Contents of examination notice, et cetera
children.label: 3 Contents of examination notice, et cetera
i
children.text: a copy of the church tax inquiry notice provided to the church under subsection (a),

children.label: ii
children.text: a description of the church records and activities which the Secretary seeks to examine,

children.label: iii
children.text: an offer to have a conference between the church and the Secretary in order to discuss, and attempt to resolve, concerns relating to such examination, and

children.label: iv
children.text: a copy of all documents which were collected or prepared by the Internal Revenue Service for use in such examination and the disclosure of which is required by the Freedom of Information Act ().5 U.S.C. 552

children.heading: Earliest day examination notice may be provided
children.label: B Earliest day examination notice may be provided
children.text: The examination notice described in subparagraph (A) shall not be provided to the church before the 15th day after the date on which the church tax inquiry notice was provided to the church under subsection (a).

children.heading: Opinion of regional counsel with respect to examination
children.label: C Opinion of regional counsel with respect to examination
children.text: Any regional counsel of the Internal Revenue Service who receives an examination notice under paragraph (1) may, within 15 days after such notice is provided, submit to the regional commissioner for the region an advisory objection to the examination.

children.heading: Examination of records and activities not specified in notice
children.label: 4 Examination of records and activities not specified in notice
children.text: Within the course of a church tax examination which (at the time the examination begins) meets the requirements of paragraphs (1) and (2), the Secretary may examine any church records or religious activities which were not specified in the examination notice to the extent such examination meets the requirement of subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) (whichever applies).

children.heading: Limitation on period of inquiries and examinations
children.label: c Limitation on period of inquiries and examinations

children.heading: Inquiries and examinations must be completed within 2 years
children.label: 1 Inquiries and examinations must be completed within 2 years

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall complete any church tax status inquiry or examination (and make a final determination with respect thereto) not later than the date which is 2 years after the examination notice date.

children.heading: Inquiries not followed by examinations
children.label: B Inquiries not followed by examinations
children.text: In the case of a church tax inquiry with respect to which there is no examination notice under subsection (b), the Secretary shall complete such inquiry (and make a final determination with respect thereto) not later than the date which is 90 days after the inquiry notice date.

children.label: i
children.text: a judicial proceeding brought by the church against the Secretary with respect to the church tax inquiry or examination is pending or being appealed,

children.label: ii
children.text: a judicial proceeding brought by the Secretary against the church (or any official thereof) to compel compliance with any reasonable request of the Secretary in a church tax examination for examination of church records or religious activities is pending or being appealed, or

children.label: iii
children.text: the Secretary is unable to take actions with respect to the church tax inquiry or examination by reason of an order issued in any judicial proceeding brought under section 7609,

children.label: B
children.text: for any period in excess of 20 days (but not in excess of 6 months) in which the church or its agents fail to comply with any reasonable request of the Secretary for church records or other information, or

children.label: C
children.text: for any period mutually agreed upon by the Secretary and the church.

children.heading: Limitations on revocation of tax-exempt status, etc.
children.label: d Limitations on revocation of tax-exempt status, etc.
i
children.text: is exempt from taxation by reason of section 501(a), or

children.label: ii
children.text: is described in section 170(c), or

children.label: i
children.text: send a notice of deficiency of any tax involved in a church tax examination, or

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of any tax with respect to which subchapter B of chapter 63 (relating to deficiency procedures) does not apply, assess any underpayment of such tax involved in a church tax examination,

children.heading: 3-year statute of limitations generally
children.label: i 3-year statute of limitations generally
children.text: In the case of any church tax examination with respect to the revocation of tax-exempt status under section 501(a), any tax imposed by chapter 1 (other than section 511) may be assessed, or a proceeding in court for collection of such tax may be begun without assessment, only for the 3 most recent taxable years ending before the examination notice date.

children.heading: 6-year statute of limitations where tax-exempt status revoked
children.label: ii 6-year statute of limitations where tax-exempt status revoked
children.text: If an organization is not a church exempt from tax under section 501(a) for any of the 3 taxable years described in clause (i), clause (i) shall be applied by substituting “6 most recent taxable years” for “3 most recent taxable years”.

children.heading: Unrelated business tax
children.label: B Unrelated business tax
children.text: In the case of any church tax examination with respect to the tax imposed by section 511 (relating to unrelated business income), such tax may be assessed, or a proceeding in court for the collection of such tax may be begun without assessment, only with respect to the 6 most recent taxable years ending before the examination notice date.

children.heading: Exception where shorter statute of limitations otherwise applicable
children.label: C Exception where shorter statute of limitations otherwise applicable
children.text: Subparagraphs (A) and (B) shall not be construed to increase the period otherwise applicable under subchapter A of chapter 66 (relating to limitations on assessment and collection).

children.heading: Information not collected in substantial compliance with procedures to stay summons proceeding
children.label: e Information not collected in substantial compliance with procedures to stay summons proceeding
A
children.text: the notice requirements of subsection (a) or (b),

children.label: B
children.text: the conference requirement described in subsection (b)(3)(A)(iii), or

children.label: C
children.text: the approval requirement of subsection (d)(1) (if applicable),

children.heading: Remedy to be exclusive
children.label: 2 Remedy to be exclusive
children.text: No suit may be maintained, and no defense may be raised in any proceeding (other than as provided in paragraph (1)), by reason of any noncompliance by the Secretary with the requirements of this section.

children.heading: Limitations on additional inquiries and examinations
children.label: f Limitations on additional inquiries and examinations
A
children.text: a revocation, notice of deficiency, or assessment described in subsection (d)(1), or

children.label: B
children.text: a request by the Secretary for any significant change in the operational practices of the church (including the adequacy of accounting practices),

children.heading: Applicable 5-year period
children.label: 2 Applicable 5-year period
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), the term “applicable 5-year period” means the 5-year period beginning on the date the notice taken into account for purposes of subsection (c)(1) was provided. For purposes of the preceding sentence, the rules of subsection (c)(2) shall apply.

children.heading: Treatment of final report of revenue agent
children.label: g Treatment of final report of revenue agent
children.text: Any final report of an agent of the Internal Revenue Service shall be treated as a determination of the Secretary under paragraph (1) of section 7428(a), and any church receiving such a report shall be treated for purposes of sections 7428 and 7430 as having exhausted the administrative remedies available to it.

children.label: A
children.text: any organization claiming to be a church, and

children.label: B
children.text: any convention or association of churches.

children.label: A
children.text: is exempt from tax under section 501(a) by reason of its status as a church, or

children.label: B
children.text: is carrying on an unrelated trade or business (within the meaning of section 513) or otherwise engaged in activities which may be subject to taxation under this title.

children.label: A
children.text: church records at the request of the Internal Revenue Service, or

children.label: B
children.text: the religious activities of any church.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “church records” means all corporate and financial records regularly kept by a church, including corporate minute books and lists of members and contributors.

children.label: i
children.text: pursuant to a summons to which section 7609 applies, or

children.label: ii
children.text: from any governmental agency.

children.heading: Inquiry notice date
children.label: 5 Inquiry notice date
children.text: The term “inquiry notice date” means the date the notice with respect to a church tax inquiry is provided under subsection (a).

children.heading: Examination notice date
children.label: 6 Examination notice date
children.text: The term “examination notice date” means the date the notice with respect to a church tax examination is provided under subsection (b) to the church.

children.heading: Appropriate high-level Treasury official
children.label: 7 Appropriate high-level Treasury official
children.text: The term “appropriate high-level Treasury official” means the Secretary of the Treasury or any delegate of the Secretary whose rank is no lower than that of a principal Internal Revenue officer for an internal revenue region.

children.heading: Section not to apply to criminal investigations, etc.
children.label: i Section not to apply to criminal investigations, etc.

children.text: any criminal investigation,
any inquiry or examination relating to the tax liability of any person other than a church,

any assessment under section 6851 (relating to termination assessments of income tax), section 6852 (relating to termination assessments in case of flagrant political expenditures of section 501(c)(3) organizations), or section 6861 (relating to jeopardy assessments of income taxes, etc.),
any willful attempt to defeat or evade any tax imposed by this title, or
any knowing failure to file a return of tax imposed by this title.
